---
title: "pennyone.js"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\bin\pennyone.js"
loc: 139
complexity: 9
logic_score: 2.52
style_score: 3.79
intel_score: 2.84
overall_score: 1.89
---

## Intent
The `pennyone.js` sector implements modular logic focusing on program, results, daemon, statsDir, pidFile, pid, statsDir, pidFile, pid, statsDir, graphPath, graph, knownFiles, reportFiles, removed. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via program, results, daemon, statsDir, pidFile, pid, statsDir, pidFile, pid, statsDir, graphPath, graph, knownFiles, reportFiles, removed. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 38 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [Command](file://commander)
- [*](file://chalk)
- [runScan](file://../src/tools/pennyone/index.js)
- [P1Daemon](file://../src/tools/pennyone/daemon.js)
- [startProxy](file://../src/tools/pennyone/vis/proxy.js)
- [searchMatrix](file://../src/tools/pennyone/live/search.js)
- [*](file://node:fs)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [registry](file://../src/tools/pennyone/pathRegistry.js)
- [ANS](file://../src/node/core/ans.js)

### Exports
- `program`
- `results`
- `daemon`
- `statsDir`
- `pidFile`
- `pid`
- `statsDir`
- `pidFile`
- `pid`
- `statsDir`
- `graphPath`
- `graph`
- `knownFiles`
- `reportFiles`
- `removed`
